overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in western attire walking along a forested hillside trail. The scene features a winding dirt path through dense deciduous woods with views of a valley and water body to the left, captured during golden hour lighting with partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested hillside trail with valley overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding forest trail, moving deeper into the hillside woods with the valley visible to the left

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the hillside
tall green leafy trees forming a partial canopy over the trail
distant view of a wide valley visible through gaps in the trees
large lake or river visible in the valley below
steep earthen slope with exposed rock and grass
prominent gray boulder emerging from the hillside vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view following a character walking along a narrow dirt trail through dense deciduous forest. The path winds along a hillside with a steep rocky slope on the right and views of a distant valley and water body visible through the trees on the left. The lighting is warm and diffused from the partly cloudy sky during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail passing large rock formation

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path, passing close to a large rock formation on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the forest trail, passing by a large rock formation that sits prominently on the right side of the path. The trail remains enclosed by dense trees with the valley view still visible to the left. The rock formation gradually recedes into the distance as the character moves forward.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily downhill toward a more open view of the water body, with the trail curving slightly left

entered.detail: far shore of the water body becoming visible across the valley

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character continues along the trail as the large rock formation passes out of view behind. The path descends slightly, bringing the water body into clearer view on the left side. The forest remains dense around the trail with the valley opening up ahead to reveal the distant shoreline across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forested hillside trail that gradually opens to reveal a wider vista of a distant valley and shoreline. It begins by following a character walking a narrow dirt path through dense deciduous woods, where a steep rocky slope rises to the right and glimpses of water appear through the trees on the left. As the character moves forward under the warm, diffused light of the golden hour, the camera passes a prominent large rock formation that slowly recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts as the path descends slightly, causing the forest to part and the water body to come into clearer view. Finally, the trail opens up further to reveal the expansive valley and the distant shoreline across the water.
